title: Fix cockpit backend: use correct repo path and venv
description: Diagnosis (MTASK-0114-RETRY1) shows: (1) The running cockpit backend is at /home/larieladmin/mide-pilot/pilot_v1/customide/backend/ (started as root via /usr/local/bin/python3.12), NOT itheia-llm/MIDE. (2) The correct venv with fastapi 0.115.0 is at /home/larieladmin/mide-pilot/pilot_v1/customide/backend/.venv. Steps: (a) cd /home/larieladmin/mide-pilot && git pull origin main to get latest code including _repo_root() fix; (b) kill all pids on port 5555 individually; (c) start uvicorn using /home/larieladmin/mide-pilot/pilot_v1/customide/backend/.venv/bin/python from /home/larieladmin/mide-pilot/pilot_v1/customide/backend/; (d) wait for HTTP 200 on localhost:5555/api/status/token-counters; (e) verify rows_count > 0 and source_file path is correct (no doubled pilot_v1). Report venv_path used, new_pid, rows_count, source_file.
